categories.label: Category 1
products: Lip Products of all types (solid and liquid lipsticks, balms, clear or colored, etc.)

categories.label: Category 2
products: Deodorant and antiperspirant products of all types including any product with intended or reasonably foreseeable use on the axillae or labelled as such (spray, stick, roll-on, under-arm, deo-cologne, etc.)

categories.label: Category 3
categories.description: Products applied to the face/body using fingertips
products: Eye products of all types (eye shadow, mascara, eyeliner, eye make-up, eye masks, eye pillows, etc.) including eye care and moisturizer
Make-up remover for face and eyes
Wipes or refreshing tissues for face, neck, hands, body
Body and face paint (for children and adults)
Facial masks for face and around the eyes

categories.label: Category 4
products: Hydroalcoholic and non-hydroalcoholic fine fragrance of all types (Eau de Toilette, Parfum, Cologne, solid perfume, fragrancing cream, etc.), aftershaves of all types (except creams and balms)
Ingredients of perfume kits and fragrance mixtures for cosmetic kits

categories.label: Category 5A
categories.description: Body lotion products applied to the body using the hands (palms), primarily leave-on
products: Body creams, oils, lotions of all types
Insect repellent (intended to be applied to the skin)
All powders and talc (excluding baby powders and talc)

categories.label: Category 5B
categories.description: Face moisturizer products applied to the face using the hands (palms), primarily leave-on
products: Facial moisturizers and creams (including care products for beard and mustache)

categories.label: Category 5C
categories.description: Hand cream products applied to the hands using the hands (palms), primarily leave-on
products: Nail care products including cuticle creams, nail lacquer remover, etc.

categories.label: Category 5D
categories.description: Baby creams, baby oils and baby talc
products: Baby cream/lotion, baby oil, baby powders and talc

categories.label: Category 6
categories.description: Products with oral and lip exposure

categories.label: Category 7A
categories.description: Rinse-off products applied to the hair with some hand contact
products: Hair permanent or other hair chemical treatments (rinse-off) (e.g., relaxers), including rinse-off hair dyes

categories.label: Category 7B
categories.description: Leave-on products applied to the hair with some hand contact
products: Hair sprays of all types (pumps, aerosol sprays, etc.)
Hair styling aids non sprays (mousse, gels, leave-on conditioners)
Hair permanent or other hair chemical treatments (leave-on) (e.g., relaxers), including leave-on hair dyes

categories.label: Category 9
categories.description: Products with body and hand exposure, primarily rinse off
products: Body washes and shower gels of all types
Bath gels, foams, mousses, salts, oils and other products added to bathwater (such as bath bombs)
Foot care products (feet are placed in a bath for soaking)
Shaving creams of all types (stick, gels, foams, etc.)
All depilatories (including facial) and waxes for mechanical hair removal

categories.label: Category 10A
categories.description: Household care products with mostly hand contact
products: Laundry pre-treatment of all types (e.g., paste, sprays, sticks)
Hard surface cleaners of all types (bathroom and kitchen cleansers, furniture polish, etc.)
Machine laundry detergents with skin contact (e.g., liquids, powders) including concentrates
Fabric softeners of all types excluding fabric softener sheets

Household cleaning products, other types including fabric cleaners, soft surface cleaners, carpet cleaners, furniture polishes sprays and wipes, leather cleaning wipes, stain removers, fabric enhancing sprays, treatment products for textiles (e.g., starch sprays, fabric treated with fragrances after wash, deodorizers for textiles or fabrics)
Fragranced oil for lamp ring, reed diffusers, pot-pourri, liquid refills for air fresheners (non-cartridge systems), etc.
Dry cleaning kits (involving manual application on the textile)

categories.label: Category 10B
categories.description: Household care aerosol/spray products (with potential leave-on skin contact)
products: Animal sprays - sprays applied to animals of all types
Air freshener sprays, manual, including aerosol and pump

categories.label: Category 11A
categories.description: Products with intended skin contact but minimal transfer of fragrance to skin from inert substrate without UV exposure
products: Feminine hygiene conventional pads, liners, interlabial pads

categories.label: Category 11B
categories.description: Products with intended skin contact but minimal transfer of fragrance to skin from inert substrate with potential UV exposure
products: Facial masks (paper/protective) e.g., surgical masks not used as medical device

categories.label: Category 12
categories.description: Products not intended for direct skin contact, minimal or insignificant transfer to skin
products: Laundry detergents for machine wash with minimal skin contact (e.g., liquid tabs, pods)

Automated air fresheners and fragrancing of all types (concentrated aerosol with metered doses (range 0.05-0.5mL/spray), plug-ins, closed systems, solid substrate, membrane delivery, electrical, powders, fragrancing sachets, incense, liquid refills (cartridge), air freshening crystals, solid non aerosol car diffuser)
Deodorizers/maskers not intended for skin contact (e.g., fabric drying machine deodorizers, carpet powders)
Dry cleaning kits (placed in the dryer)
Dryer sheets and fabric softener sheets
Insecticides (e.g., mosquito coil, paper, electrical, for clothing) excluding aerosols/sprays
Dishwash detergent and deodorizers - for machine wash
Scent delivery system (using dry air technology)
